name: fordhamverse-live
description: A real-time 3D Fordham campus MMO with live events, Replit quests, and an AI Campus TA.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,agent -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev:agent"
scripts.build: npm run build -w spacetime-module && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w spacetime-module && npm run typecheck -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w spacetime-module && npm run test:agent
